meta.title: Leptospira interrogans serovar unipertama isolated in Malaysia -- Bahaman et al. 40 (1): 98 -- International Journal of Systematic and Evolutionary Microbiology

abstractHtml: A leptospiral isolate from a bovine kidney was found to be antigenically different from all previously recognized serovars of Leptospira interrogans based on the cross-agglutinin absorption test. The new serovar belongs to the Sejroe serogroup, and the name Leptospira interrogans serovar unipertama is proposed for it, with strain K2-1 as the reference strain.
